title: RealtimeMeasurements
description: A set of measurements for a specific time period and data center or aggregated across all data centers.

requests.description: The total number of requests received.

pass.description: The number of requests that passed through to origin.

header_size.description: The total header size in bytes.

body_size.description: The total body size in bytes.

status_1xx.description: The number of responses with 1xx status codes.

status_2xx.description: The number of responses with 2xx status codes.

status_3xx.description: The number of responses with 3xx status codes.

status_4xx.description: The number of responses with 4xx status codes.

status_5xx.description: The number of responses with 5xx status codes.

hit_ratio.description: The ratio of cache hits to total requests.
